title: BSN-BSSN Perkuat Sinergi Persiapan Migrasi ke Algoritma Post-Quantum Cryptography
description: BSN (national standards body) and BSSN news on strengthening synergy to prepare migration to post-quantum cryptography algorithms, covering standardization support and conformity assessment.

title: BSSN : Panduan Teknis Implementasi Algoritma Kriptografi (Pengenalan Post-Quantum Cryptography v1.0)
description: Blog (cybersecurity.or.id) describing BSSN technical guidance for implementing Indonesian cryptographic algorithms and BSSN's 'Pengenalan Post-Quantum Cryptography' v1.0 document.

title: Perkuat Keamanan Siber Indonesia, BSSN Gelar FGD Kebijakan dan Implementasi Algoritma Kriptografi Indonesia
description: Makassar city government CSIRT post reporting on a BSSN FGD on policy and implementation of Indonesian cryptographic algorithms, referencing post-quantum cryptography.

title: JakTek Series 2: Perkembangan Post Quantum Cryptography dan SNI ISO
description: Makassar city government CSIRT post on developments in post-quantum cryptography and related SNI ISO standards.

title: Peraturan BSSN No. 11 Tahun 2024 tentang Penyelenggaraan Algoritma Kriptografi Indonesia dan Penilaian Kesesuaian Keamanan Modul Kriptografi
description: BSSN regulation on the implementation of Indonesian cryptographic algorithms and conformity assessment of cryptographic module security. No explicit PQC reference confirmed.

title: UJI PUBLIK RANCANGAN PERATURAN BSSN TENTANG PENYELENGGARAAN ALGORITMA KRIPTOGRAFI INDONESIA
description: BSSN public consultation on draft regulations on Indonesian cryptographic algorithm implementation and Common Criteria certification scheme. No explicit PQC reference confirmed.

title: BSSN And PTPK Malaysia Strengthen Cyber Diplomacy In The Post-Quantum Era
description: Journalism (VOI) on BSSN and Malaysia's PTPKM discussing bilateral cooperation in cryptography and readiness for the post-quantum cryptography era.

title: Mengamankan Keuangan Indonesia di Era Ancaman Kuantum
description: Kompas opinion/news on securing Indonesian finance in the quantum-threat era, referencing PQC, Bank Indonesia, ASPI, and a national agenda. Journalism.

title: Periset BRIN Ungkap Potensi Komputasi Kuantum sebagai Teknologi Masa Depan
description: BRIN news on quantum computing potential as a future technology. General quantum, no explicit PQC migration reference confirmed.

title: Songsong Revolusi Kuantum, BRIN Fasilitasi Pusat Kolaborasi Riset Kuantum 2.0 dan HPC
description: BRIN news on facilitating a quantum research collaboration center and HPC. General quantum research, no explicit PQC reference confirmed.

title: PQC Lab Indonesia
description: PQC learning, experimentation and testing platform for Indonesia (ML-DSA, ML-KEM, Hybrid TLS, X.509). Non-government platform.

title: Industri Pembayaran Siaga Hadapi Ancaman Siber dan Era Quantum Computing
description: Kontan news on the payments industry preparing for cyber threats and the quantum computing era, referencing Bank Indonesia and ASPI. Journalism.
